inputs.titre: Édit de Compiègne contre les Protestants

reason: The image depicts a gathering that could potentially represent the signing of the Edict of Compiègne. The men are dressed in period-appropriate clothing (doublets, ruff collars). The setting appears to be a large chamber with large windows and heavy curtains, lit by candles. There are no immediately visible anachronisms or fantastical elements. However, the lighting seems somewhat modern and the sharpness of the image feels artificial, suggesting it might be a digitally created image or heavily edited. Also, the uniformity of the clothing may be questionable; while similar garments were worn, they would likely exhibit more individual variation.
